title: N-th Fibonacci Number
description: Compute the N-th Fibonacci number modulo 10⁹+7. F(1)=1, F(2)=1, F(n)=F(n-1)+F(n-2). In Optimization mode, a naive recursive O(2^n) solution scores worse than an iterative O(n) one.

botCodes.code:
n=int(input())
MOD=10**9+7
a,b=1,1
for _ in range(n-2):a,b=b,(a+b)%MOD
print(a if n==1 else b)

let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let md=1000000007 in if n<=2 then Printf.printf"1\n" else begin let a=ref 1 and b=ref 1 in for _=2 to n-1 do let c=(!a + !b) mod md in a:= !b;b:=c done;Printf.printf"%d\n" !b end
